creator: vit1251@mail.ru
text:
Kernel panic.

Fix: 

I am think need detect read-only "da" device.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	Camera SONY DSC-S80 as drive without memory card(for access to
	internal read-only memory). In /dev/ was create new da0 and da0s1.
	After mount all right but when start unmount (and in sync)
	system try to write change and fail. Can't dismount. If dismount
	-force then crash kernel.
